title: 5 things every AI agent harness needs
summary: Muhammad Farooq presents five critical components required in an AI agent harness to move from prototypes to production systems. The harness is framed as the execution layer that transforms model predictions into completed tasks, distinct from the underlying AI model itself.
writeup: Muhammad Farooq outlines five components that an AI agent harness needs to move from prototypes to production. The harness is presented as the execution layer that turns model predictions into completed tasks, distinct from the underlying AI model. The discussion situates these components within AI agents, multi-agent systems, and edge deployment.
